name: SourVR Video Player Deluxe Edition
short_description: SourVR provides an easier way to enjoy local or online VR video content without any setting hassle. Automatic VR video format detection and support all major format. Online video content aggregation updates every week for your enjoyment.
detailed_description:
SourVR VIdeo Player Deluxe Edition

SourVR provides an easier way to enjoy local or online VR video content without any setting hassle. Automatic VR video format detection and support all major format. Online video content aggregation updates every week for your enjoyment.

Adapt to major video format for best experience

Plug and play with all major VR device, auto detection for major video format. No more complex setting for video playback.

One click to keep your pleasure going

Use any type of your controller as remote to fast forward or pause at anytime. View any type of video from your local library or internet in one click.

Find your VR video in a blink

Huge content selection in one platform, easy to navigate by category. Massive video entertainment is waiting for you to explore.

Key Features

  • Supports HTC Vive, Oculus Rift and OpenVR headsets.
  • Supports Vive controllers, Oculus remote, keyboard and mouse.
  • Support 2D, 180°, 360°, Over Under and Side by Side videos.
  • Automatic video format setting memorized.
  • Streaming video support and youtube playback support.
  • Online video content aggregation.
  • Local files navigation in HMD.
  • Screen projection size adjustment.

Video Format Support

.mp4, .m4v, .mp4v, .3g2, .3gp2, .3gp, .3gpp, .mpg, .mpeg, .m1v, .mp2, .mp3, .mpa, .mpe, .m3u, .asf, .wma, .wmv, .wm, .asx, .wax, .wvx, .wmx, .avi, .ivf, .mov
